controlSet.description: Classify consequence intensity, systemic coupling, interpretive authority, and dependency lock-in.
Require reconstructable decision pathways from inputs to effects.
Require halt, rollback, correction, or reversal mechanisms before cascading harm.
Prevent automated components from expanding interpretive authority beyond declared scope.
Provide effective challenge paths before or during consequential effects.

rules: Classify consequence intensity, systemic coupling, interpretive authority, and dependency lock-in.
Require reconstructable decision pathways from inputs to effects.
Require halt, rollback, correction, or reversal mechanisms before cascading harm.
Prevent automated components from expanding interpretive authority beyond declared scope.
Provide effective challenge paths before or during consequential effects.

threats.description: Automated effects cascade before institutional correction is possible.
System expands from classification to rights-sensitive interpretation.
Users or institutions cannot exit without losing essential access.
Decision pathways cannot be reconstructed independently.

transitions.trigger: supersession or replacement by stronger artifact

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as a legacy secondary representation.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
